case_title: EDITTE LERMAN VS. DEBORAH HELLER et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-06-2004 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST EDITTE LERMAN, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAY-03-2004, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-18-2004. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: CHRISTINA PAXTON. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SEP-07-2004 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE IN LIGHT OF THE HISTORY OF FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-10-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Carlito Mandia, CSR 689. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2004 Continued To Sep-07-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 9/7/2004 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Beldon Yee. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-03-2004 Continued To Jul-06-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
